title: KLA's (KLAC) Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates in Q4
text: KLA's (KLAC) fiscal Q4 results reflect gains from increased customer demand across major product groups. Also, growing investments in Foundry & Logic remain a tailwind.

title: KLA Corporation (KLAC) CEO Rick Wallace on Q4 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kevin Kessel - Vice President, Investor Relations Rick Wallace - Chief Executive Officer Bren Higgins - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Harlan Sur - JPMorgan Joe Quatrochi - Wells Fargo Patrick Ho - Stifel Atif Malik - Citi Vedvati Shrotre - Jefferies Operator Good afternoon. My name is Leo and I will be your conference operator today.

title: KLA stock declines as part of forecast earnings range falls below Street consensus
text: KLA Corp. shares slipped in the extended session Thursday after the chip-equipment maker reported a big earnings beat but part of its forecast earnings range for the current quarter fell below the Wall Street consensus.

title: KLA CORPORATION REPORTS FISCAL 2022 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR RESULTS
text: For the quarter, total revenues were $2.49 billion, GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $5.40 and non-GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $5.81, each finishing above the mid-point of guidance ranges; Cash flow from operations for the quarter and fiscal year was $819.2 million and $3.31 billion and free cash flow was $746.1 million and $3.01 billion, respectively; and Capital returns for the quarter and fiscal year were $3.63 billion and $5.51 billion, respectively. MILPITAS, Calif.

title: 7 Best Cash Cow Stocks to Buy for Stable Returns
text: Investors seeking shelter from the market selloff through 2022 can take a look at some of the best cash cow stocks to buy. The post 7 Best Cash Cow Stocks to Buy for Stable Returns appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Can KLA (KLAC) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: KLA (KLAC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: KLA Corporation Announces Pricing of Tender Offer
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation ("KLA") (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced the Reference Yield and Total Consideration (each as summarized in the table below) to be paid in connection with the previously announced cash tender offer (the "Tender Offer") for up to $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount (the "Maximum Amount") of its 4.650% Senior Notes due 2024 ("Notes").

title: KLA Corporation Announces Early Results of Previously Announced Cash Tender Offer
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation ("KLA") (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced the early results of the previously announced cash tender offer (the "Tender Offer") for up to $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount (the "Maximum Amount") of its 4.650% Senior Notes due 2024 ("Notes").

title: KLA Announces Fourth Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Earnings Date
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , July 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation  (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced that the company will review fourth quarter fiscal year 2022 earnings on Thursday, July 28, 2022, at 2 p.m.
